name: Journal Downloader
description: Batch download PDFs from journal TOC pages + export TOC to Markdown with full title/DOI/links/abstract. Parsers: NEJM, Nature, Science, Lancet, BMJ, Annals of Internal Medicine, JAMA. Hybrid abstract fetch: Crossref API first → HTML scrape fallback. v3.11 (2026-04-22): JAMA parser (jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/currentissue) — 21 section types, strict OA gate (hasPdf = `.badge.icon-free`; non-OA checkbox disabled per bug-fix) to prevent paywall-HTML masquerading as PDF. v3.10: AIM parser (acpjournals.org/toc/aim) — 18 section types, inline TOC summary captured.
